## Use Case

Describe the workflow this would improve.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior.

## Data Source

If this depends on external data, list the source and whether it is official, stable, and legally usable.

## Notes

This project avoids investment advice wording and keeps missing data explicit.
